video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Under the lights at the Parc des Princes, PSG’s attacking firepower led by Ousmane Dembélé, Achraf Hakimi and Vitinha takes on Liverpool, featuring stars such as Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Florian Wirtz, in a quarter‑final that promises elite quality, relentless pace and razor‑thin margins. Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Barcelona’s attacking flair, led by Lamine Yamal and the experience of Robert Lewandowski, meets the dynamism of Antoine Griezmann and the shot‑stopping assurance of Jan Oblak. A high‑intensity night is expected at Camp Nou, where the hosts are still searching for their first UCL victory over Atlético Madrid. Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
video_info.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
